creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 225754
Screenshot: four tabs, four different pages, none shows the subject

Recent changes seem to place the subject line at the tail of the title, which makes it unnecessarily difficult to distinguish between things in: 

* tabs of web browsers
* bookmarks

– and so on. 

In the attached screenshot, four tabs show nothing more than the generic name of the list; the four subject lines are invisible. 

Please present the subject at the beginning, not the end. 

Thank you
